title: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup

seo.title: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup Recipe (Easy & Indian)
seo.metaDescription: Discover our delicious Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup recipe! This authentic Indian soup is hearty, flavorful, and easy to make at home. Perfect for any meal.

authentic Indian Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup
lowCompetitionKeywords: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup without coconut milk
Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup pressure cooker
seo.h1: Authentic Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup Recipe
h2Headings: What is Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup?
Ingredients for Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup
Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: A warm bowl of Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup garnished with fresh cilantro and a lime wedge.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy a comforting bowl of this vibrant and aromatic Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup, a true taste of India.

description: Experience the rich, aromatic flavors of our Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup, a delightful Indian classic. This comforting and hearty soup, brimming with wholesome lentils and fragrant spices, offers a perfect blend of warmth and zest. It is an ideal meal for a cozy evening, promising a truly authentic culinary journey.

instructions.title: Prepare Lentils and Aromatics
instructions.text: Rinse the red lentils thoroughly under cold water until the water runs clear. Set aside. Chop the onion, mince the garlic, and grate the ginger, preparing all your aromatics for cooking.

instructions.title: Temper Spices
instructions.text: Heat oil or ghee in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds, letting them splutter for about 30 seconds. Add the bay leaf and cook for another 10 seconds until fragrant.

instructions.title: Sauté Vegetables and Spices
instructions.text: Add the chopped onion to the pot and sauté until translucent, about 5-7 minutes. Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until aromatic. Add curry powder, turmeric powder, and coriander powder, stirring continuously for 30 seconds to toast the spices.

instructions.title: Simmer the Soup Base
instructions.text: Add the diced tomatoes to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring to break them down slightly. Pour in the rinsed lentils and vegetable broth. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.

instructions.title: Adjust Consistency and Flavor
instructions.text: Once lentils are cooked, remove the bay leaf. If desired, use an immersion blender to partially blend the soup for a creamier texture, leaving some lentils whole for body. Stir in the coconut milk, if using, and heat through for 2 minutes without boiling.

instructions.title: Finish and Serve
instructions.text: Remove the pot from heat. Stir in the fresh lime juice, salt, and black pepper to taste. Ladle the hot Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup into bowls, garnish generously with fresh cilantro, and serve immediately with rice or naan bread.

tips: For an authentic tempering, ensure your oil is hot enough for the mustard seeds to pop, but not so hot that other spices burn quickly.
If you prefer a thicker soup, reduce the amount of broth or simmer uncovered for a longer period. For a thinner soup, add more broth or water.
This soup tastes even better the next day as the flavors meld. Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days.
article: Mulligatawny Spiced Lentil Soup is a beloved Indian Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Indian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
